questions.stem: For unity feedback closed loop system with G(s)H(s) = K(s+2)/(s(s+1)(s+3)): Indicate the portion of root locus which will lie on real axis of s-plane. Show it in Fig. 1.
common_errors: Forgetting to count total poles+zeros to the right of a test point
Including zeros in the pole count or vice versa
questions.solution_method: n=3, m=1; poles at p1=0, p2=-1, p3=-3; zero at z1=-2. Real axis RL exists to the left of an odd count of real poles+zeros: segments (-∞,-3), (-2,-1), and (0, right half-plane excluded).
key_formulas: Real axis rule: RL on real axis where total real poles+zeros to the right is odd

questions.stem: For the same system G(s)H(s) = K(s+2)/(s(s+1)(s+3)): Calculate the angle of asymptotes and centroid and show it in Fig. 1.
common_errors: Using n instead of (n-m) for number of asymptotes
Sign error in centroid formula: forgetting to subtract zero locations
Using q starting from 1 instead of 0
questions.solution_method: Number of asymptotes = n-m = 3-1 = 2. Angles: φ_A = (2q+1)×180°/(n-m) for q=0,1 → 90°, 270°. Centroid: σ_A = (sum of poles - sum of zeros)/(n-m) = (0-1-3-(-2))/2 = -2/2 = -1.

questions.stem: For the same system G(s)H(s) = K(s+2)/(s(s+1)(s+3)): Find the breakaway point and indicate it clearly in Fig. 1.
common_errors: Not verifying which roots of dK/ds=0 are actually on the root locus
Accepting complex roots as breakaway points without checking RL membership
questions.solution_method: Express K = -(s³+4s²+3s)/(s+2) from characteristic equation 1+G(s)H(s)=0. Set dK/ds=0: differentiate using quotient rule to get 2s³+10s²+16s+6=0. Roots: s=-0.534 (valid, on real-axis RL segment), s=-2.23±0.792j (complex, not valid). Breakaway point is s≈-0.534.

questions.stem: For the same system G(s)H(s) = K(s+2)/(s(s+1)(s+3)): Draw the complete root locus in Fig. 1.
common_errors: Not showing branches departing along asymptotes at 90°/270° from centroid (-1)
Missing the breakaway point at s≈-0.534
Incorrect direction of locus on real axis segments
questions.solution_method: Combine results from (a)-(c): draw real-axis segments, mark centroid at -1, asymptotes at ±90° from σ=-1, show breakaway at s≈-0.534 between poles 0 and -1, branches from s=0 and s=-1 break away and travel along ±j∞ asymptotes; branch from s=-3 travels to zero at s=-2.
key_formulas: Complete RL uses: real-axis rule, asymptote angles and centroid, breakaway points, departure/arrival angles

notes: Single question with 4 sub-parts (a-d), all on root locus for G(s)H(s)=K(s+2)/(s(s+1)(s+3)). Total marks: 6. Date: 24.03.2026. Duration: 12 minutes. Complete root locus sketch included in solution (Fig. 1).
